name: AIRR Compute: AI Open Access Application

name: QUB Honorary Research Fellow Application
notes: QUB route is partner/research-affiliation outreach, not a grant submission. Use only as a partner-development route.

name: Aureon Evidence Studio for Createch AI Workflows

Monitor assessment and feedback; reopening is reserved for a deliberate resubmission decision. Total eligible cost is GBP250,000 with grant request GBP175,000 and company contribution GBP75,000.

name: Aureon Evidence Studio - EIC Accelerator Step 1 Draft
notes: EIC Step 1 pack exists as a preparation route. Customer discovery notes, LOIs or pilot interest, competitor map, prototype or demo evidence, FTO/IP note, finance plan, and privacy policy are required before external submission.

name: Aureon Evidence Studio - Innovation Loans EOI
notes: Innovation Loans is a loan route rather than grant funding. Submission requires repayment, cashflow, subsidy, finance-risk, and director approval records.
